# Epic Template

> Frame a larger workstream. Capture problem, goal, constraints, ACT board, verification strategy, and follow-ups.

---

## Title

<!-- Short descriptive title for the epic -->

## Status

`[Draft | In Progress | Completed | Archived]`

## Problem

<!-- What pain point or opportunity motivates this epic? Why does it matter now? -->

## Goal

<!-- What does success look like? What outcome are we driving toward? -->

## Non-goals

<!-- What is explicitly out of scope for this epic? -->

## Context / Evidence

<!-- Relevant background, data, or prior art that informs this epic. What led us here? -->

## Constraints

<!-- Technical, organizational, or resource constraints that shape the solution space. -->

## ACT Board

| ACT | Owner | Status | Notes |
| --- | ----- | ------ | ----- |
| <!-- ACT-001 --> | <!-- @user --> | <!-- Pending --> | <!-- Brief description --> |
| <!-- ACT-002 --> | <!-- @user --> | <!-- Pending --> | <!-- Brief description --> |
| <!-- ACT-003 --> | <!-- @user --> | <!-- Pending --> | <!-- Brief description --> |

## Verification Strategy

<!-- How will we know the epic delivered value? What metrics, tests, or signals matter? -->

## Risks and Unknowns

| Risk | Likelihood | Impact | Mitigation |
| ---- | ----------- | ------ | ---------- |
| <!-- Risk description --> | <!-- Low/Medium/High --> | <!-- Low/Medium/High --> | <!-- Mitigation approach --> |

## Close Criteria

<!-- What must be true to consider this epic done? -->

- [ ] All ACTs completed
- [ ] Verification strategy satisfied
- [ ] Follow-ups captured and triaged

## Follow-ups

<!-- Future work identified during this epic that falls outside its scope. -->

- [ ] <!-- Follow-up description --> (owner: @user)
